en.name: Neos Tribute
en.effect: You can Normal Summon or Set "Elemental HERO Neos" with 1 less Tribute during this Duel.

fr.name: Sacrifice de Néos
fr.effect: Vous pouvez Invoquer Normalement ou Poser "Néos, HÉROS Élémentaire" avec 1 Sacrifice en moins lors de ce Duel.

releases.details: Reduce your opponent's LP to 0 by inflicting battle damage with "Elemental HERO Neos" using Jaden Yuki
